Weekly Team Sync
Notes
Last edited: 2024-09-14 by rachel.kim@example.com

================================================================================
Weekly Engineering Sync — Meeting Notes
Date: September 13, 2024
Attendees: Rachel Kim, Tom Alvarez, Nina Okafor, Ben
Shapira
================================================================================

1.	Sprint Progress Update

  
- Authentication
token
refresh logic	completed and merged
  	- Dashboard loading time reduced from 3.2s to 1.1s after
optimization
 
 - Mobile
push notification service deployed
to staging


	 [COMMENT by tom.alvarez@example.com]: The token refresh changes	look good.

 	I tested with expired tokens	and the renewal flow	works	seamlessly.

   [COMMENT
by	nina.okafor@example.com]: Can we	schedule a	demo	of the
	 	dashboard improvements for
the product team next Tuesday?

2. Code Review Backlog

   - PR
#1247: Database migration for new	metrics table — needs
review
	  - PR	#1251: Refactored sync scheduler — approved,	ready to merge
	  - PR #1253: Added
retry logic
for
webhook failures
— in
review

   [SUGGESTION by ben.shapira@example.com]: We should aim to
close all open
 	 PRs before
the end of sprint.	Currently 6
are waiting for review.

3. Infrastructure Updates


	 -
AWS costs reduced	by 15% after
right-sizing EKS nodes
   -	Database read replicas	now active
in us-west-2
	
	- Monitoring	dashboards updated with new	service metrics

4. Technical	Debt Items

	
 - Migrate remaining JavaScript	files to TypeScript (14
files left)
 	 - Update deprecated API	endpoints in partner	integrations
	  - Consolidate duplicate utility functions across	services
   - Improve test coverage
for edge	cases in correlation engine

5. Action	Items

   - [
] Tom:
Review PR
#1247 by end of	day Wednesday
   - [ ] Nina: Start TypeScript migration for utility modules
 	 -
[
] Ben: Update monitoring alerts for new threshold values
	
 -	[
] Rachel: Prepare onboarding materials for new team
member

---	End	of Meeting Notes
---
Next sync: September 20, 2024 at 10:00	AM PST
